items.name: The Classic R6 Bundle
items.description:
The Classic R6 Bundle

Experience the Classic feeling of R6 with the modern movement of R15!

Features: Works with 2d clothing and feels classic
Suggestions: 0% scale or 100% height/50% proportions. [Use your own head as well]

Bundle without studs: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/382945
Modern Beveled: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/381560

items.name: Lumber Luxe Flannel
items.description:
🛒 Available now CTRL DRIP https://www.roblox.com/communities/35900790/CTRL-DRIP#!/store
🔥 Inspired by timeless luxury with a streetwear soul.
🔴 Bold red-and-black flannel — classic checkered pattern, reborn with modern attitude.
👔 Clean lines, crisp cuffs — for Robloxians who work hard and look harder.
